name: Jaguar Men Classic EDT
description: A refined and powerful fragrance for the modern man. Jaguar Men Classic EDT combines fresh aromatic notes with the depth of white woods and tonka beans.

name: Versace Men Dylan Blue
description: A strong, masculine fragrance that captures the essence of the Mediterranean. With notes of calabrian bergamot, grapefruit, and fig leaves.

name: GIORGIO ARMANI Aqua Di Gio
description: A timeless marine fragrance that conveys the spirit of freedom and the sea. Fresh and citrusy with a subtle woody base.

name: Dunhill Men Icon Elite
description: A sophisticated woody fragrance for the distinguished gentleman. Icon Elite represents the pinnacle of Dunhill's olfactory excellence.

name: Paco Rabbane Men Invictus
description: The scent of victory. A bold contrast between biting freshness and animalistic sensuality.

name: Dolce & Gabbana Women The Only One
description: A floral fragrance that captures the essence of sophisticated and hypnotizing femininity.

name: Michael Kors Women Sexy Amber
description: A sumptuous and warm fragrance that radiates glamour and confidence.

name: Bvlgari Splendid Jasmin Noir
description: An elegant and mysterious floral fragrance that celebrates the sublime jasmine flower.

name: Versace Pour Femme Dylan Blue
description: A tribute to femininity. A strong, sensuous, refined fragrance for a woman who knows her power.

name: Carolina Herrera Women Good Girl
description: It's good to be bad. A powerful and evocative fragrance with notes of almond, coffee, jasmine, and cocoa.

name: Tom Ford Unisex Tobacco Vanille
description: An opulent, warm and iconic fragrance. A modern take on an old-world apothecary tradition.

name: Byredo Unisex Gypsy Water
description: An ode to the beauty of Romani culture, its unique customs, intimate beliefs and distinguished way of living.
